## Honest readability assessment

Max breakpoint count on any single feature/tier is **8** rows. Most features collapse to 1-3 rows after merging -- genuinely hand-auditable at a glance. A handful of continuous features (gap/density/aug_* ms-valued features) retain more rows; those read as a step-function table, not a single number, but are still finite and inspectable -- not a black box.

Relane trees are depth<=2 (<=7 nodes), genuinely small enough to read as nested if/else at a glance -- see scorecard_rules.py.
